fixture_role: VESTA parity reference, not absolute physical truth
parity_resolution: Use the corrected VESTA-exported CIF with Se1 occupancy 1.0000 plus Waasmaier-Kirfel f0 and legacy Cu Kalpha1 anomalous terms; this is VESTA parity, not absolute physics.
done_investigating_rule: If VESTA-like factors stay below regression target, use them; if future table residual is irreducible, set tolerance from measured residuals and update this metadata.
